name: mcp-sophon
description: Deterministic context compressor for MCP agents. Slots in front of prompt caching, mem0, Letta, or Claude Code — compresses prompts, conversation memory, code digests, file deltas, and shell output. Single Rust binary, zero ML at query time, MCP 2025-06-18. ~24% additional tokens / ~49% additional $ saved on top of Anthropic prompt caching. 68% session tokens saved on 25-turn agent session, 70% mean prompt compression at 36 ms, code retrieval recall@3 70% (vs grep 10%), p99 < 87 ms on 5/7 ops. Beats LLMLingua-2 by +8.9 pts at 35x lower latency.
author: Sophon Contributors
